## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Monograph's pivot to focus on Q1 product launch and align GrowthX's content strategy accordingly.](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monograph is shifting focus from Monograph Method to Q1 product launch (new pricing tiers, CRM, AI features)](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Website refresh planned, including new pages for CRM and AI products](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Content strategy to be adjusted: establish authority in CRM/AI space, then support product launch](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide granular content support, avoiding keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

## Topics

### Monograph's Strategic Pivot

  - [Shifting focus from Monograph Method campaign to Q1 product launch](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [New launch elements:](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Three-tier pricing structure](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [CRM product launch](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Enhanced focus on AI product](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Appealing more to engineers throughout the website](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Website refresh planned:](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [New product pages](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Feature tier system](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [New pricing page](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Updated homepage](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

### CRM Product Details

  - [Internal name "Leads" (likely to change)](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Forecast/pipeline visualization](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Work prospecting stages](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Win likelihood predictions](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Not including: newsletters, SMS, outbound emails](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Competing with BQE and Dell Tech in the CRM space](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [GrowthX to pivot content focus to support new product launch](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Phased approach for content creation:](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
    1.  Establish authority in CRM/AI space (can start immediately)
    2.  Support product launch with specific content (prepare 2-4 weeks in advance)
  - [Granular content creation possible, down to feature-level](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Avoid keyword cannibalization between architect and engineer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

### SEO and Website Optimization

  - [Consider using "A\&E firms" for higher intent, industry-specific targeting](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Potential page structure: overarching A\&E tag with separate journeys for architects and engineers](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Schema markup becoming increasingly important for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [GrowthX developing new tools for tracking GEO and overall metrics](https://fathom.video/share/vstdCj7xs5ByB5Bz8ssy6BQykknmz5yd?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
